subcodes.first_line: O flame of the love of God! The ray must shed light and the sun must rise; the full moon must shine and the star must gleam.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شعله محبت الله شعاعرا سطوعی باید و آفتاب را طلوعی و بدر را نوری و نجم را
subcodes.subjects: @being a source of light; guidance, @praise and encouragement, @love of God
